title: Alejandro Camara
text:
Education
California State Polytechnic University, Pomona
Bachelor of Science in Business Administration
Concentrations: International Business and Marketing Management

title: Projects
text: This page showcases some of my International Business and Marketing projects as a student at Cal Poly Pomona.

title: Projects
text:
Exporting - India Business Plan
As part of a group project for International Exporting course, I analyzed the Infrastructure in India, and the Physical environment and its effect on trade. The purpose of this project was develop a plan to export Nike shoes from the United States to India.

Researched the Infrastructure in India, and the Physical environment and its effect on trade
Calculated the amount of shoe boxes that fit a 20 foot and 40 foot container and also airfreight.
Coordiated an optimal logistics plan

title: Projects
text:
Marketing - Gerber in the Philippines
As part of a group project for International Marketing course, I analyzed the economic zones that the Philippines is a part of and the benefits that would bring for us.

Researched the optimal market entry strategy into the Philippines from the United States.
Analyzed the tariff and non-tariff barriers and what that meant for our plan
Concluded the final plan for the venture

title: Projects
section: International Logistics - Export fertilizer to SE Asia
text:
International Logistics - Export fertilizer to SE Asia
As part of a group project for International Logistics course, I analyzed the market entry strategies to Indonesia. Also looked at the required documentation necessary to export fertilizer.

Analyzed the business environment in Indonesia
Researched the infrastructure in Indonesia
Determined the Inco terms to be used

title: Projects
text:
Consumer Behavior - Repositioned Airbnb
As part of a group project for Consumer Behavior course, I researched the company market analysis and also created a perceptual map.

Researched the company history
Analyzed their competitors and also positioned all on a expense and work suitability

title: Projects
text:
Market Analysis - Data Wrangling assignment
I wrangled data with datasets build into quarto, cleaning up data and also visualizations to show results.

Removed missing values
Presented insights
